title: Kukutesvara Siva Temple

overview.short: The Kukutesvara Siva Temple or Kukutesvara Temple is a small, 1000-year-old shrine to Shiva located in the "Temple City of India" Bhubaneswar, Orissa.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kukutesvara Siva Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kukutesvara Siva Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kukutesvara Siva Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Biju Patnaik International Airport, Bhubaneswar (112 km) and the nearest railway station is Bhubaneswar Railway Station (110 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kukutesvara Siva Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kukutesvara Siva Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kukutesvara Siva Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Kukutesvara Siva Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kukutesvara Siva Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kukutesvara Tank.
